home.techTitle.zh: 技术栈在这里形成轨道
home.techTitle.en: A living orbit of the stack

home.techDescription.zh: 把技术栈放进一片会呼吸的宇宙，后续会连接博客、项目和搜索。
home.techDescription.en: A breathing cosmos for the stack, connected to notes, projects, and search.

music.subtitle.zh: 让旋律陪着阅读与探索。
music.subtitle.en: A soundtrack for reading and exploring.

blog.subtitle.zh: 沿着目录寻找一篇笔记，或搜索全部正文。
blog.subtitle.en: Browse the tree or search every note.

blog.empty.zh: 选择左侧文章开始阅读。
blog.empty.en: Choose an article to begin reading.

projects.subtitle.zh: 一些正在生长、维护或已经封存的工程记录。
projects.subtitle.en: A collection of growing, maintained, and archived work.

notFound.title.en: This star is off the map

notFound.body.zh: 页面可能已经移动，回到首页重新出发吧。
notFound.body.en: The page may have moved. Return home and start again.

error.body.zh: 本地与远程数据都没有成功加载，请稍后重试。
error.body.en: Neither local nor remote content could be loaded. Please retry.
